creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #5)

Well you seem to know what is required to make it work with Poudriere, so why don't you share?

Because the issue is when you build items with Poudriere, you are only going 

> Naturally. You want i386 binaries, you need to build them.

Been there done that. The script offers no means to specify what repo to use as of course if you are using Poudriere for building packages for something that repo is only going to contain the binaries for the arch in question.
